title: pilosella orthotricha
intro: Pilosella orthotricha, also known as a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain compounds such as flavonoids and triterpenoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella orthotricha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Pilosella orthotricha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
